heading: Repealed. ,July 3, 1950, ch. 446, § 5(2)64 Stat. 320
label: 811 to 820 Repealed. ,July 3, 1950, ch. 446, § 5(2)64 Stat. 320
notes: Section 811, acts , ; , , vested all local legislative powers in Puerto Rico, with certain exceptions, in “Legislature of Puerto Rico”, consisting of a “senate” and a “house of representatives”.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 2539 Stat. 958May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158
Section 812, acts , ; , , related to Senate of Puerto Rico, its members, election and powers.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 2639 Stat. 958May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158
Section 813, acts , ; , , related to House of Representatives and its members and their election.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 2739 Stat. 959May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158
Section 814, acts , ; , , provided for division of Puerto Rico into thirty-five representative and seven senatorial districts.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 2839 Stat. 959May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158
Section 814a, acts , ; , , related to qualification of electors.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 3539 Stat. 963May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158

Section 815, acts , ; , , provided for time of holding elections and revision of boundaries of senatorial and representative districts and municipalities.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 2939 Stat. 959May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158
Section 816, , , related to powers of senate and house of representatives, including determination of election and qualifications of members.act Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 3239 Stat. 960
Section 817, acts , ; , , provided for holding of annual sessions of legislature and time for convening.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 3339 Stat. 960Mar. 4, 1927, ch. 503, § 544 Stat. 1420
Section 818, acts , ; , , authorized governor to call special sessions of legislature or senate.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 3339 Stat. 960Mar. 4, 1927, ch. 503, § 544 Stat. 1420

Section 819, acts , ; , ; , , related to term of office of senators and representatives, filling of vacancies, and limitations upon appointment to other offices of those legislative members.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 3039 Stat. 959May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158June 1, 1938, ch. 30852 Stat. 595

Section 820, acts , ; , ; , ; , , related to compensation and mileage of members of senate and house of representatives.Mar. 2, 1917, ch. 145, § 3139 Stat. 960Mar. 4, 1927, ch. 503, § 444 Stat. 1420May 17, 1932, ch. 19047 Stat. 158June 24, 1948, ch. 610, § 462 Stat. 580
Effective Date of RepealRepeal of sections 811 to 820 effective , see note set out under .July 25, 1952section 732 of this title
